tiers.name: Business Basic (Donated)
tiers.nonprofitNote: Up to 300 donated licenses via Microsoft for Nonprofits

dlp.label: Not available
dlp.detail: Purview DLP requires Business Premium or higher

sensitivityLabels.label: Not available
sensitivityLabels.detail: Manual sensitivity labels require Business Premium or higher

sharingControls.label: Available
sharingControls.detail: Admin-level SharePoint/OneDrive external sharing controls — restrict who can share outside the org

domainRestrictions.label: Available
domainRestrictions.detail: Domain allowlist/blocklist for external sharing in SharePoint admin center

sitePermissions.label: Available
sitePermissions.detail: Per-site external sharing restrictions configurable in SharePoint admin center

securityGroups.label: Available
securityGroups.detail: Microsoft 365 Groups and Security Groups for access control

conditionalAccess.label: Not available
conditionalAccess.detail: Conditional Access requires Entra ID P1, included in Business Premium or higher

ome.label: Not available
ome.detail: Office Message Encryption requires Business Premium or higher

irm.label: Not available
irm.detail: Azure Rights Management / IRM requires Business Premium or higher

irmAutoApply.label: Not available
irmAutoApply.detail: Auto-apply IRM via DLP requires E5

ediscovery.label: Limited
ediscovery.detail: Basic content search only — no case management, legal hold, or export capabilities

intune.label: Not available
intune.detail: Intune device management requires Business Premium or higher

securityCenter.label: Not available
securityCenter.detail: Microsoft 365 Security Center / Defender requires Business Premium or higher

smime.label: Not available
smime.detail: S/MIME configuration requires Business Premium or higher

recommendations: Configure SharePoint external sharing to 'Only people in your organization' as the default
Set up domain allowlists for trusted partner organizations in SharePoint admin center
Create Microsoft 365 Groups aligned to departments for access control (HR, Finance, Programs)
Restrict per-site sharing on sites containing sensitive data
Enable Security Defaults in Entra ID (free MFA for all users — critical baseline)
Train staff on manual file protections: restrict download/copy/print via Share settings
Create a data classification reference document with naming conventions (e.g., prefix files with [CONFIDENTIAL])
Consider upgrading to Business Premium ($5.50/user/mo) for sensitivity labels, DLP, and Conditional Access

tiers.name: Business Standard

dlp.label: Not available
dlp.detail: Purview DLP requires Business Premium or higher

sensitivityLabels.label: Not available
sensitivityLabels.detail: Manual sensitivity labels require Business Premium or higher

securityGroups.label: Available
securityGroups.detail: Microsoft 365 Groups and Security Groups for access control

conditionalAccess.label: Not available
conditionalAccess.detail: Conditional Access requires Entra ID P1, included in Business Premium or higher

ome.label: Not available
ome.detail: Office Message Encryption requires Business Premium or higher

irm.label: Not available
irm.detail: Azure Rights Management / IRM requires Business Premium or higher

irmAutoApply.label: Not available
irmAutoApply.detail: Auto-apply IRM via DLP requires E5

ediscovery.label: Limited
ediscovery.detail: Basic content search only — no case management, legal hold, or export

intune.label: Not available
intune.detail: Intune device management requires Business Premium or higher

securityCenter.label: Not available
securityCenter.detail: Microsoft 365 Security Center / Defender requires Business Premium or higher

smime.label: Not available
smime.detail: S/MIME configuration requires Business Premium or higher

recommendations: Same security controls as Business Basic — Standard adds desktop Office apps but no additional security features
Configure SharePoint external sharing to 'Only people in your organization' as the default
Set up domain allowlists for trusted partner organizations
Create Microsoft 365 Groups aligned to departments for access control
Enable Security Defaults in Entra ID (free MFA for all users)
Use per-site sharing restrictions on sites containing T3/T4 data
Train staff on manual file protections in SharePoint/OneDrive
Strongly consider upgrading to Business Premium ($5.50/user/mo) — the security gap between Standard and Premium is significant

tiers.name: Business Premium
tiers.nonprofitNote: ~75% off commercial pricing; up to 300 users

dlp.label: Available
dlp.detail: Purview DLP for Exchange, SharePoint, and OneDrive — create rules to detect and protect sensitive data (SSNs, credit cards, etc.)

sensitivityLabels.label: Available (manual)
sensitivityLabels.detail: Create and manually apply sensitivity labels to documents and emails. Labels can enforce encryption and access restrictions.

securityGroups.label: Available
securityGroups.detail: Microsoft 365 Groups and Security Groups for access control

conditionalAccess.label: Available
conditionalAccess.detail: Entra ID P1 Conditional Access — control access based on device compliance, location, and app

ome.label: Available
ome.detail: Purview Message Encryption (OME) — encrypt emails sent to external recipients. Recipients open via web portal.

irm.label: Available
irm.detail: Azure Rights Management (IRM) — encrypt and restrict documents. Tied to sensitivity labels for persistent protection.

irmAutoApply.label: Not available
irmAutoApply.detail: Auto-apply IRM via DLP requires E5

ediscovery.label: Limited
ediscovery.detail: Content search available; eDiscovery Standard (case management, legal hold, export) requires E3 or higher

intune.label: Available
intune.detail: Intune Plan 1 — enroll and manage devices, enforce compliance policies, remote wipe

securityCenter.label: Partial
securityCenter.detail: Defender for Business and Defender for Office 365 Plan 1; partial Security Center access

smime.label: Available
smime.detail: S/MIME email encryption configurable in Exchange Online with organizational PKI

recommendations: Deploy sensitivity labels matching your classification tiers: Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted
Configure DLP rules to detect sensitive data (SSNs, credit card numbers, health identifiers) — start in audit-only mode
Set up Conditional Access policies: require compliant devices for T3/T4 data access
Enroll all devices in Intune and enforce compliance (screen lock, encryption, OS updates)
Enable Purview Message Encryption for external emails containing sensitive data
Configure IRM on sensitivity labels so Confidential and Restricted documents stay encrypted even when shared
Train all staff on applying sensitivity labels when creating or uploading documents
Enable Defender for Office 365 to protect against phishing and malware in email/Teams

tiers.name: Enterprise E3
tiers.nonprofitNote: ~75% off commercial pricing; no user cap

dlp.label: Available
dlp.detail: Full Purview DLP for Exchange, SharePoint, and OneDrive with advanced rule configuration

sensitivityLabels.label: Available (manual)
sensitivityLabels.detail: Full manual sensitivity labeling with encryption, access restrictions, and visual markings

autoLabeling.label: Not available
autoLabeling.detail: Service-side auto-labeling requires E5 or E5 Information Protection add-on

sitePermissions.label: Available
sitePermissions.detail: Full per-site sharing and access restrictions

securityGroups.label: Available
securityGroups.detail: Microsoft 365 Groups, Security Groups, and dynamic group membership

conditionalAccess.label: Available
conditionalAccess.detail: Entra ID P1 Conditional Access — device, location, and app-based access controls

ome.label: Available
ome.detail: Purview Message Encryption for external email encryption

irm.label: Available
irm.detail: Full Azure Rights Management with sensitivity label integration

irmAutoApply.label: Not available
irmAutoApply.detail: Auto-apply IRM via DLP requires E5

ediscovery.label: Available
ediscovery.detail: eDiscovery Standard — case management, legal holds, search, and export across Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, and Teams

intune.label: Available
intune.detail: Intune Plan 1 — full mobile device and app management

securityCenter.label: Available
securityCenter.detail: Microsoft 365 Security Center with Defender for Endpoint P1

smime.label: Available
smime.detail: Full S/MIME support in Exchange Online

recommendations: Configure eDiscovery Standard — create cases for litigation and regulatory inquiries, set up legal holds
Deploy DLP policies with advanced rules for content detection across Exchange, SharePoint, and OneDrive
Create sensitivity labels with encryption for Confidential and Restricted tiers
Set up Conditional Access policies requiring managed devices for T3/T4 applications
Use eDiscovery legal holds to preserve data for compliance and legal requirements
Configure retention policies in Microsoft Purview for regulatory data retention periods
Enable Defender for Endpoint P1 for device-level threat protection
Set up Intune compliance policies: require encryption, block jailbroken devices, enforce OS updates
Train compliance staff on eDiscovery workflows: search, hold, review, and export
Consider E5 upgrade for auto-labeling if you handle large volumes of T4 data requiring automated classification

tiers.name: Enterprise E5
tiers.nonprofitNote: ~75% off commercial pricing; no user cap

dlp.label: Available (full)
dlp.detail: Full Purview DLP including Teams chat/channel messages and Endpoint DLP for managed devices

sensitivityLabels.label: Available (manual + auto)
sensitivityLabels.detail: Manual labels plus service-side auto-labeling based on content inspection

autoLabeling.label: Available
autoLabeling.detail: Service-side auto-labeling policies — automatically classify documents and emails based on content (SSNs, health records, etc.)

sharingControls.label: Available
sharingControls.detail: Full SharePoint/OneDrive sharing controls with sensitivity label integration

domainRestrictions.label: Available
domainRestrictions.detail: Full domain controls with advanced governance

sitePermissions.label: Available
sitePermissions.detail: Per-site controls with sensitivity label-based access restrictions

securityGroups.label: Available
securityGroups.detail: Full group management with dynamic membership and access reviews

conditionalAccess.label: Available (advanced)
conditionalAccess.detail: Entra ID P2 — risk-based Conditional Access using sign-in risk and user risk signals

ome.label: Available (advanced)
ome.detail: Advanced Message Encryption — revoke encrypted emails, set custom branding, multiple encryption templates

irm.label: Available
irm.detail: Full Azure Rights Management with auto-apply via DLP

irmAutoApply.label: Available
irmAutoApply.detail: DLP rules can automatically apply sensitivity labels with encryption based on content detection

ediscovery.label: Available (premium)
ediscovery.detail: eDiscovery Premium — custodian workflows, review sets with AI-powered relevance, advanced analytics, and conversation threading

intune.label: Available
intune.detail: Full Intune with advanced device management and app protection

securityCenter.label: Available (full)
securityCenter.detail: Full Microsoft 365 Defender XDR with Defender for Endpoint P2, Defender for Office 365 P2, Insider Risk Management

smime.label: Available
smime.detail: Full S/MIME with advanced certificate management

recommendations: Deploy auto-labeling policies to classify documents based on content — reduce reliance on manual labeling
Configure DLP for Teams to prevent sensitive data sharing in chat and channel messages
Enable Endpoint DLP to monitor and restrict sensitive data on managed devices (USB, print, clipboard)
Set up risk-based Conditional Access using Entra ID P2 sign-in and user risk signals
Configure eDiscovery Premium with review sets and AI-powered relevance for efficient legal review
Deploy Advanced Message Encryption with custom branding and revocation capability
Enable Insider Risk Management to detect and investigate potential data exfiltration
Use Defender XDR for unified threat investigation across email, endpoints, identity, and apps
Set up Audit Premium for 1-year log retention and advanced audit events
Create automated DLP incident workflows with notification rules and escalation paths
Run auto-labeling in simulation mode for 2-4 weeks before enforcement to tune accuracy

businessBasic.detail: Set organization-level sharing to 'Only people in your organization' to prevent accidental external sharing

businessBasic.path: SharePoint admin center > Policies > Sharing > Advanced settings
businessBasic.detail: Add trusted partner domains to the allowlist so staff can share with approved organizations

businessBasic.path: Microsoft 365 admin center > Teams & groups > Active groups
businessBasic.detail: Create groups per department (HR, Finance, Programs). These control access to SharePoint sites, Teams channels, and shared mailboxes

businessBasic.path: SharePoint admin center > Sites > Active sites > [site] > Sharing
businessBasic.detail: For sites containing sensitive data, override the org default to restrict external sharing entirely

businessBasic.path: Entra admin center > Properties > Manage security defaults
businessBasic.detail: Enable Security Defaults to require MFA for all users. This is free and the single most impactful security control.

businessBasic.path: Microsoft 365 admin center > Settings > Org settings > Security & privacy > Password expiration policy
businessBasic.detail: Consider disabling password expiration (NIST 800-63 guidance) and instead requiring strong, unique passwords with MFA

businessBasic.path: Entra admin center > Applications > Enterprise applications > Consent and permissions
businessBasic.detail: Restrict user consent for third-party apps — require admin approval for new app access
Show staff how to restrict download/print/copy via SharePoint document library settings and file sharing options
Since sensitivity labels aren't available, create a shared document explaining tiers and naming conventions (e.g., [CONFIDENTIAL] prefix)

businessBasic.path: Microsoft 365 admin center > Users > Active users > [user] > Manage admin roles
businessBasic.detail: Ensure at least 2 people have Global Administrator access to prevent lockout

businessStandard.detail: Complete all foundational steps first — Business Standard has the same security feature set as Basic

businessStandard.step: Review and optimize SharePoint site structure
businessStandard.path: SharePoint admin center > Sites > Active sites
businessStandard.detail: Organize sites by function with appropriate sharing settings. Standard adds more storage which may prompt site reorganization.

businessStandard.path: SharePoint admin center > Policies > Sharing > OneDrive
businessStandard.detail: Set OneDrive default sharing to 'Specific people' to prevent over-sharing via 'Anyone with link'
Document the security gaps between Standard and Premium. The $5.50/user/mo upgrade adds DLP, sensitivity labels, Conditional Access, and Intune — all critical for T3/T4 data.

businessPremium.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Information protection > Labels
businessPremium.detail: Create labels matching your classification tiers: Public, Internal, Confidential (encrypt), Restricted (encrypt + restrict). Publish to all users.

businessPremium.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Information protection > Label policies
businessPremium.detail: Require a default label on documents and emails. Set Confidential as default for sensitive departments.

businessPremium.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Data loss prevention > Policies
businessPremium.detail: Create rules for common sensitive data: SSNs, credit card numbers, health identifiers. Start in 'Test' mode before enforcing.

businessPremium.path: Entra admin center > Protection > Conditional Access > Policies
businessPremium.detail: Create policies: require MFA for all users; require compliant devices for accessing T3/T4 SharePoint sites; block legacy authentication
Set up device enrollment for managed devices. Create compliance policies requiring encryption, PIN, and current OS.

businessPremium.path: Microsoft 365 Defender portal > Email & collaboration > Policies
businessPremium.detail: Configure Safe Links and Safe Attachments policies for phishing and malware protection

businessPremium.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Information protection > Encryption
businessPremium.detail: Configure OME templates for encrypting external emails. Create mail flow rules for auto-encryption of emails with Restricted labels.
Train all staff on applying sensitivity labels. Focus on: when to use each tier, how encryption affects sharing, what restrictions each label enforces.

businessPremium.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Data loss prevention > Alerts
businessPremium.detail: After enabling DLP in test mode, review alerts weekly. Tune rules to reduce false positives before switching to enforcement.

e3.detail: Complete all foundational and Premium-tier steps first

e3.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > eDiscovery > Standard
e3.detail: Create initial cases. Assign eDiscovery Manager role to compliance/legal staff. Train on search, hold, and export workflows.

e3.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > eDiscovery > Standard > [case] > Holds
e3.detail: Create holds for any active litigation, regulatory inquiry, or internal investigation. Holds preserve email, OneDrive, and SharePoint content.

e3.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Data lifecycle management > Retention policies
e3.detail: Set retention periods: 7 years for financial records, per-state requirements for HR data, per-regulation for program data.

e3.path: Microsoft 365 Defender portal > Settings > Endpoints > Onboarding
e3.detail: Onboard managed devices to Defender for Endpoint P1 for device-level threat detection and response

e3.path: Intune admin center > Devices > Compliance policies
e3.detail: Create device compliance policies that feed into Conditional Access: require encryption, block jailbroken devices, enforce OS update deadlines

e3.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Information barriers
e3.detail: If departments must be isolated (e.g., HR data from general staff), set up information barriers to prevent cross-segment communication
Ensure at least 2 staff know how to create cases, place holds, run searches, review results, and export for external counsel
Create internal procedures for legal hold requests, retention policy changes, DLP exception handling, and eDiscovery export

e5.detail: Complete all foundational through E3-tier steps first

e5.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Information protection > Auto-labeling
e5.detail: Create policies to auto-label documents containing SSNs, health records, financial data. Run in simulation mode for 2-4 weeks before enforcing.

e5.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Data loss prevention > Policies
e5.detail: Extend DLP policies to Teams chat and channel messages. Block sharing of sensitive data (SSNs, credit cards) in Teams conversations.

e5.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Data loss prevention > Endpoint DLP settings
e5.detail: Monitor and restrict sensitive data on managed devices: block USB copy, restrict printing, control clipboard for classified documents

e5.path: Entra admin center > Protection > Conditional Access > Policies
e5.detail: Create policies using Entra ID P2 risk signals: require MFA for risky sign-ins, block high-risk users, enforce password change for compromised accounts

e5.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > eDiscovery > Premium
e5.detail: Set up custodian management, create review sets with AI-powered relevance scoring, configure conversation threading for Teams/email

e5.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Insider risk management
e5.detail: Configure policies to detect data exfiltration, security policy violations, and departing employee data theft

e5.path: Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Information protection > Encryption
e5.detail: Configure custom branding for encrypted emails and enable message revocation capability for T4 communications
Activate 1-year audit log retention. Configure high-value audit events for monitoring privileged activities.
Set up unified security operations: connect Defender for Endpoint P2, Defender for Office 365 P2, and Defender for Identity for cross-domain threat investigation
Document automated DLP alert routing, triage procedures, escalation paths, and exception request process with time-limited waivers

e5.path: Entra admin center > Identity governance > Access reviews
e5.detail: Create recurring access reviews for groups with T3/T4 data access. Assign department managers as reviewers.
